---
title: 'Distortion (White Noise, Episode 1 (or Book 1?))'
date: '2023-11-29T07:32:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
---

<div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Distortion (White Noise, Episode 1 (or Book 1?)) - Draft Elevator Pitch/Tagline</h4><div>
<div></div><blockquote><div>What if your apparent curse was your greatest gift, but embracing this truth came at the cost of a normal life?</div><div><br /></div><div>Major Theron 'Ash' Ashland, a medically retired USAF officer, grapples with PTSD after a paranormal science experiment goes awry.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>Seeking some semblance of normalcy, Ash's world is upended once more when he realizes his perceived curse â€“ disruptive hallucinations â€“ is a rare gift â€“ the ability glimpse unseen realms and alternate dimensions.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>What will it cost him to know for sure?</div></blockquote><div></div><br /><br /><b>Working Draft Book Covers / Not Final&nbsp;<br /></b><br /><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiJnHZnB_QVTxcXL5fJQ5kdETnihhKkNQf6TsO4OmYnqKJ8Srnm1aTFj8nI3GpfhVx1kZTcbqfRuh0D5PUpBRwn1eMuQrMeVbLLw7OgGW0fF-Z5y1ac7bEokn62ozn2Go_KwQBfbhexliXVzMW3riimlUCFuh9NUI49WB0CrpdMkNeG9FAsdAbKF-GDzlc/s400/Distortion%20Cover%20for%20White%20Noise%20(2018).jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" data-original-height="400" data-original-width="256" height="320" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiJnHZnB_QVTxcXL5fJQ5kdETnihhKkNQf6TsO4OmYnqKJ8Srnm1aTFj8nI3GpfhVx1kZTcbqfRuh0D5PUpBRwn1eMuQrMeVbLLw7OgGW0fF-Z5y1ac7bEokn62ozn2Go_KwQBfbhexliXVzMW3riimlUCFuh9NUI49WB0CrpdMkNeG9FAsdAbKF-GDzlc/s320/Distortion%20Cover%20for%20White%20Noise%20(2018).jpg" width="205" /></a><br />
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-ebook-3c763f474713.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" data-original-height="481" data-original-width="315" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-ebook-e22b2d6b0393.jpg" width="210" /></a><br />
<br />
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="https://darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<label>Subscribe Now - Pursue a No Hiding Lifestyle</label>&nbsp;<input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" required="" type="email" value="" /><br />
<div aria-hidden="true" style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe (DG Wolfe)</span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about_12.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/" target="_blank">Clifton StrengthsFinder</a>: Intellection, Learner,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Ideation,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">&nbsp;Achiever, Input</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">16Personalities</a> (Myers-Briggs Type): INFJ</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><br /></div>
